ranked_matches.title: Pakistan Super League: Quetta Gladiators vs Karachi Kings
West Indies Women vs Australia Women (1st ODI)

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is currently in progress, with South Australia at 89/3 at one point. The Pakistan Super League match between Quetta Gladiators and Karachi Kings is scheduled to start soon (07:00). The AFC U20 Asian Cup China 2025 concluded in March 2025.
